pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh constant BASE_DIR and task description.
Confirmed via export_result.sh constant EXP_FILE and task description.
Confirmed via export_result.sh constant COND_DIR and task description.
Confirmed via verifier.py and export_result.sh which check for exactly these three CSV files.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to generate an Operation Span (OSpan) PsychoPy experiment in the directory /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ospan. The main experiment file must be saved as ospan.psyexp. The conditions directory must be created inside the project directory and populated with exactly three CSV files: set_size_3.csv, set_size_4.csv, and block_list.csv.
